name: UBA : Account or Group or Privileges Modified
notes:
This event detects when a user performs an action that modifies a user account or group or policy and dispatches an IBM Sense event to increment the originating user's risk score.

    Clients wishing to tune the impact of this rule on users' overall risk scores may consider modifying the building block rule "BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Changed" by adding event categories of interest to their organization.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Changed
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Changed
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Account or Group or Privileges Modified on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Changed
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Account or Group or Privileges Modified
